name: Complex64
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var a = Complex64(3.0, 4.0)
    var b = Complex64(1.0, 2.0)
    var s = a + b
    print(s.re)
    print(s.im)
    var d = a - b
    print(d.re)
    print(d.im)
    var p = a * b
    print(p.re)
    print(p.im)
    var n = -a
    print(n.re)
    print(n.im)
    print(a.magnitude())
    print(Int(a == a))
    print(Int(a == b))

name: Vec3d
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var a = Vec3d(1.0, 2.0, 3.0)
    var b = Vec3d(4.0, 5.0, 6.0)
    var s = a + b
    print(s.x)
    print(s.y)
    print(s.z)
    var d = b - a
    print(d.x)
    print(d.y)
    print(d.z)
    var m = a * 2.0
    print(m.x)
    print(m.y)
    print(m.z)
    var n = -a
    print(n.x)
    print(a.dot(b))
    var c = a.cross(b)
    print(c.x)
    print(c.y)
    print(c.z)

name: Frac
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var a = Frac(1, 2)
    var b = Frac(1, 3)
    var s = a + b
    print(s.num)
    print(s.den)
    var d = a - b
    print(d.num)
    print(d.den)
    var p = a * b
    print(p.num)
    print(p.den)
    var c = Frac(2, 4)
    print(c.num)
    print(c.den)
    print(Int(c == Frac(1, 2)))
    print(Int(b < a))
    print(Int(a < b))

name: Mat3
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var a = Mat3(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 10)
    var b = Mat3(1, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1)
    var s = a + b
    print(s.m[0])
    print(s.m[4])
    print(s.m[8])
    var t = b * 5.0
    print(t.m[0])
    print(t.m[4])
    print(a.trace())
    print(a.det())
    print(b.det())

name: Poly2
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var p = Poly2(1.0, -3.0, 2.0)
    var q = Poly2(0.0, 1.0, 1.0)
    var s = p + q
    print(s.a)
    print(s.b)
    print(s.c)
    var d = p - q
    print(d.a)
    print(d.b)
    print(d.c)
    var m = q * 3.0
    print(m.b)
    print(p.eval(2.0))
    print(p.eval(0.0))
    print(Int(p == p))
    print(Int(p == q))

name: Money2
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var a = Money2(1099)
    var b = Money2(250)
    var s = a + b
    print(s.cents)
    var d = a - b
    print(d.cents)
    var m = b * 3
    print(m.cents)
    print(Int(b < a))
    print(Int(a < b))
    print(Int(a == a))

name: ModP
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var a = ModP(5)
    var b = ModP(4)
    var s = a + b
    print(s.v)
    var d = a - b
    print(d.v)
    var e = b - a
    print(e.v)
    var p = a * b
    print(p.v)
    print(Int(s == ModP(2)))
    print(Int(a == b))

name: TimeSpan
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var a = TimeSpan(1, 30, 0)
    var b = TimeSpan(0, 45, 30)
    var s = a + b
    print(s.hours())
    print(s.minutes())
    print(s.seconds())
    var d = a - b
    print(d.hours())
    print(d.minutes())
    print(d.seconds())
    var m = b * 2
    print(m.secs)
    print(Int(b < a))
    print(Int(a == a))

name: Interval2
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var a = Interval2(1.0, 5.0)
    var b = Interval2(3.0, 8.0)
    var s = a + b
    print(s.lo)
    print(s.hi)
    var m = a * 2.0
    print(m.lo)
    print(m.hi)
    print(a.width())
    print(Int(a.contains(3.0)))
    print(Int(a.contains(7.0)))
    print(Int(a.overlaps(b)))
    print(Int(a.overlaps(Interval2(6.0, 9.0))))
    print(Int(a == a))

name: Quat
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var a = Quat(1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 4.0)
    var b = Quat(0.0, 1.0, 0.0, 0.0)
    var s = a + b
    print(s.w)
    print(s.x)
    var d = a - b
    print(d.x)
    var p = a * b
    print(p.w)
    print(p.x)
    print(p.y)
    print(p.z)
    var c = a.conj()
    print(c.x)
    print(c.y)
    print(a.norm2())
    print(Int(a == a))

name: Mat2d
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var a = Mat2d(1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 4.0)
    var b = Mat2d(2.0, 0.0, 1.0, 2.0)
    var s = a + b
    print(s.a)
    print(s.d)
    var p = a.matmul(b)
    print(p.a)
    print(p.b)
    print(p.c)
    print(p.d)
    var m = a * 2.0
    print(m.b)
    print(a.det())
    print(a.trace())
    print(Int(a == a))

name: Dual
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var x = Dual(3.0, 1.0)
    var c = Dual(2.0, 0.0)
    var s = x + c
    print(s.val)
    print(s.eps)
    var d = x - c
    print(d.val)
    print(d.eps)
    var p = x * x
    print(p.val)
    print(p.eps)
    var q = x * c
    print(q.val)
    print(q.eps)
    var n = -x
    print(n.eps)
    print(Int(x == x))
